Bash(conda run -n torch-cuda12.8 python -c "
import pandas as pd
import os

data_dir = ''/home/nm0610/Code/gnss-clutering-2/data''
csv_files = sorted\([f for f in os.listdir\(data_dir\) if f.endswith\(''.csv''\) and f.startswith\(''full_gnss''\)]\)

for f in csv_files:
    path = os.path.join\(data_dir, f\)
    df = pd.read_csv\(path\)
    df[''Timestamp''] = pd.to_datetime\(df[''Timestamp'']\)
    
    n = len\(df\)
    t_min = df[''Timestamp''].min\(\)
    t_max = df[''Timestamp''].max\(\)
    
    # Kiem tra thu tu
    is_sorted = df[''Timestamp''].is_monotonic_increasing
    
    # Dem so cho bi dao nguoc
    diffs = df[''Timestamp''].diff\(\)
    n_backwards = \(diffs < pd.Timedelta\(0\)\).sum\(\)
    
    # Dem duplicates
    n_dupes = df[''Timestamp''].duplicated\(\).sum\(\)
    
    # Kiem tra gaps \(> 1 giay\)
    n_gaps = \(diffs > pd.Timedelta\(seconds=1\)\).sum\(\)
    
    # Tong so giay ky vong
    total_seconds = int\(\(t_max - t_min\).total_seconds\(\)\) + 1
    missing_seconds = total_seconds - n + n_dupes
    
    status = ''OK'' if is_sorted and n_dupes == 0 else ''LOI''
    
    print\(f''{f:25s} | {n:>8,} rows | {status:4s} | ''
          f''backwards={n_backwards:>5} | dupes={n_dupes:>5} | ''
          f''gaps={n_gaps:>5} | missing_s={missing_seconds:>7,} / {total_seconds:>7,} | ''
          f''{t_min} -> {t_max}''\)
")

Bash(conda run -n torch-cuda12.8 python -c "
import pandas as pd
import os

data_dir = ''/home/nm0610/Code/gnss-clutering-2/data''
csv_files = sorted\([f for f in os.listdir\(data_dir\) if f.endswith\(''.csv''\) and f.startswith\(''full_gnss''\)]\)

for f in csv_files:
    path = os.path.join\(data_dir, f\)
    print\(f''Processing {f}...''\)
    
    # Doc file
    df = pd.read_csv\(path\)
    df[''Timestamp''] = pd.to_datetime\(df[''Timestamp'']\)
    n_before = len\(df\)
    
    # 1. Sort theo thoi gian
    df = df.sort_values\(''Timestamp''\).reset_index\(drop=True\)
    
    # 2. Loai bo duplicates \(giu ban ghi dau tien\)
    df = df.drop_duplicates\(subset=''Timestamp'', keep=''first''\)
    
    # 3. Tao chuoi thoi gian day du \(moi giay 1 mau\)
    full_range = pd.date_range\(start=df[''Timestamp''].min\(\),
                               end=df[''Timestamp''].max\(\),
                               freq=''1s''\)
    
    # 4. Reindex – dien NaN cho cac giay thieu
    df = df.set_index\(''Timestamp''\)
    df = df.reindex\(full_range\)
    df.index.name = ''Timestamp''
    df = df.reset_index\(\)
    
    n_after = len\(df\)
    n_nan = df[''h_Coord''].isna\(\).sum\(\)
    
    # 5. Luu lai
    df.to_csv\(path, index=False\)
    
    print\(f''  {n_before:>10,} -> {n_after:>10,} rows  ''
          f''\(+{n_after - n_before:>8,} NaN rows filled\)''\)

print\(\)
print\(''HOAN THANH! Tat ca file da duoc sap xep va dien NaN.''\)
")

Bash(conda run -n torch-cuda12.8 python -c "
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import matplotlib
matplotlib.use\(''Agg''\)
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from mpl_toolkits.mplot3d import Axes3D
import os

data_dir = ''/home/nm0610/Code/gnss-clutering-2/data''
result_dir = ''/home/nm0610/Code/gnss-clutering-2/result''
os.makedirs\(result_dir, exist_ok=True\)

csv_files = sorted\([f for f in os.listdir\(data_dir\) if f.endswith\(''.csv''\) and f.startswith\(''full_gnss''\) and f != ''full_gnss_e.csv'']\)

stations = []
for f in csv_files:
    path = os.path.join\(data_dir, f\)
    df = pd.read_csv\(path, usecols=[''X_Coord'',''Y_Coord'',''h_Coord''], nrows=5000\)
    name = f.replace\(''full_gnss_'',''''\).replace\(''.csv'',''''\)
    stations.append\({
        ''name'': name,
        ''X'': df[''X_Coord''].mean\(\),
        ''Y'': df[''Y_Coord''].mean\(\),
        ''h'': df[''h_Coord''].mean\(\),
    }\)

sdf = pd.DataFrame\(stations\)
print\(sdf.to_string\(\)\)

# Phan loai
east_mask = sdf[''name''].str.contains\(''e''\)
west_mask = sdf[''name''].str.contains\(''w''\) & ~sdf[''name''].str.startswith\(''10''\)
high_mask = sdf[''name''].str.startswith\(''10''\)

fig = plt.figure\(figsize=\(16, 12\)\)
ax = fig.add_subplot\(111, projection=''3d''\)

# Ve tung nhom
for mask, color, marker, label in [
    \(east_mask, ''red'', ''o'', ''East \(E\)''\),
    \(west_mask, ''blue'', ''s'', ''West \(W\)''\),
    \(high_mask, ''green'', ''^'', ''High West \(101w-105w\)''\),
]:
    subset = sdf[mask]
    ax.scatter\(subset[''X''], subset[''Y''], subset[''h''],
               c=color, marker=marker, s=200, alpha=0.9,
               edgecolors=''black'', linewidths=0.8, label=label, zorder=5\)
    
    for _, row in subset.iterrows\(\):
        ax.text\(row[''X'']+15, row[''Y'']+15, row[''h'']+0.5,
                row[''name''], fontsize=9, fontweight=''bold'', color=color\)

# Ve duong noi cac cap E-W cung vi tri
pairs = [\(''1e'',''1w''\), \(''2e'',''2w''\), \(''3e'',''3w''\), \(''4e'',''4w''\), \(''5e'',''5w''\), \(''6e'',''6w''\)]
for e_name, w_name in pairs:
    e = sdf[sdf[''name'']==e_name].iloc[0]
    w = sdf[sdf[''name'']==w_name].iloc[0]
    ax.plot\([e[''X''], w[''X'']], [e[''Y''], w[''Y'']], [e[''h''], w[''h'']],
            ''k--'', alpha=0.3, linewidth=1\)

# Ve duong noi cac tram high voi tram chan tuong ung
high_pairs = [\(''101w'',''1w''\), \(''102w'',''2w''\), \(''103w'',''3w''\), \(''104w'',''4w''\), \(''105w'',''5w''\)]
for h_name, w_name in high_pairs:
    h_row = sdf[sdf[''name'']==h_name]
    w_row = sdf[sdf[''name'']==w_name]
    if len\(h_row\) and len\(w_row\):
        h_r = h_row.iloc[0]
        w_r = w_row.iloc[0]
        ax.plot\([h_r[''X''], w_r[''X'']], [h_r[''Y''], w_r[''Y'']], [h_r[''h''], w_r[''h'']],
                ''g:'', alpha=0.5, linewidth=1.5\)

ax.set_xlabel\(''X_Coord \(m\)'', fontsize=12, labelpad=10\)
ax.set_ylabel\(''Y_Coord \(m\)'', fontsize=12, labelpad=10\)
ax.set_zlabel\(''h_Coord – Do cao \(m\)'', fontsize=12, labelpad=10\)
ax.set_title\(''Vi tri 3D cac tram GNSS\\n\(17 tram, 29/05 – 11/06/2015\)'',
             fontsize=16, fontweight=''bold''\)
ax.legend\(fontsize=11, loc=''upper left''\)

ax.view_init\(elev=25, azim=-60\)

plt.tight_layout\(\)
path = os.path.join\(result_dir, ''00_station_3d_layout.png''\)
fig.savefig\(path, dpi=150, bbox_inches=''tight''\)
print\(f''\\n[saved] {path}''\)

# === Figure 2: Top-down \(X-Y\) ===
fig2, ax2 = plt.subplots\(figsize=\(14, 10\)\)

for mask, color, marker, label in [
    \(east_mask, ''red'', ''o'', ''East \(E\) – h~13-16m''\),
    \(west_mask, ''blue'', ''s'', ''West \(W\) – h~13-16m''\),
    \(high_mask, ''green'', ''^'', ''High West \(101w-105w\) – h~84-87m''\),
]:
    subset = sdf[mask]
    ax2.scatter\(subset[''X''], subset[''Y''], c=color, marker=marker,
                s=250, alpha=0.9, edgecolors=''black'', linewidths=1, label=label, zorder=5\)
    
    for _, row in subset.iterrows\(\):
        h_str = f''{row[""h""]:.1f}m''
        ax2.annotate\(f''{row[""name""]}\\n\({h_str}\)'',
                     \(row[''X''], row[''Y'']\),
                     textcoords=''offset points'', xytext=\(12, 8\),
                     fontsize=9, fontweight=''bold'', color=color,
                     bbox=dict\(boxstyle=''round,pad=0.2'', facecolor=''white'', alpha=0.7\)\)

for e_name, w_name in pairs:
    e = sdf[sdf[''name'']==e_name].iloc[0]
    w = sdf[sdf[''name'']==w_name].iloc[0]
    ax2.plot\([e[''X''], w[''X'']], [e[''Y''], w[''Y'']], ''k--'', alpha=0.3, linewidth=1\)

ax2.set_xlabel\(''X_Coord \(m\)'', fontsize=13\)
ax2.set_ylabel\(''Y_Coord \(m\)'', fontsize=13\)
ax2.set_title\(''Bo tri mat bang cac tram GNSS \(nhin tu tren xuong\)\\nDuong net dut: cap East-West cung vi tri'',
              fontsize=15, fontweight=''bold''\)
ax2.legend\(fontsize=11\)
ax2.grid\(True, alpha=0.3\)
ax2.set_aspect\(''equal''\)

plt.tight_layout\(\)
path2 = os.path.join\(result_dir, ''00_station_2d_layout.png''\)
fig2.savefig\(path2, dpi=150, bbox_inches=''tight''\)
print\(f''[saved] {path2}''\)
")

Bash(conda run -n torch-cuda12.8 python -c "
from momentfm import MOMENTPipeline
import torch
import numpy as np

model = MOMENTPipeline.from_pretrained\(''AutonLab/MOMENT-1-large'', model_kwargs={''task_name'': ''embedding''}\)
model.eval\(\)

# Test with dummy data
x = torch.randn\(2, 1, 512\)
mask = torch.ones\(2, 512\)

with torch.no_grad\(\):
    output = model\(x_enc=x, input_mask=mask\)

print\(''Output type:'', type\(output\)\)
print\(''Output fields:'', [f for f in dir\(output\) if not f.startswith\(''_''\)]\)
print\(''embeddings:'', output.embeddings\)
print\(\)

# Try embed method
output2 = model.embed\(x_enc=x, input_mask=mask\)
print\(''embed\(\) type:'', type\(output2\)\)
print\(''embed\(\) fields:'', [f for f in dir\(output2\) if not f.startswith\(''_''\)]\)
print\(''embed embeddings:'', output2.embeddings is not None if hasattr\(output2, ''embeddings''\) else ''N/A''\)
if hasattr\(output2, ''embeddings''\) and output2.embeddings is not None:
    print\(''embed shape:'', output2.embeddings.shape\)
")
